stemHtml:
What is the meaning of the following weather message?

CNL WS WRNG 1 211130/211330=

options.a: This message cancels all weather warnings issued on the 21st of January between 11:30 and 13:30 UTC.
options.b: The first wind shear warning on the 21st of that month with an occasional intensity has a forecast validity from 11:30 until 13:30 UTC.
options.c: The weather warning with the number 121 concerning a cyclone at low levels has a validity time from 11:30 until 13:30 UTC.
options.d: The first wind shear warning on the 21st of that month, issued at 11:30 UTC has been cancelled on the same day at 13:30 UTC.
